description: Auditor binding spec for the climate_emission_minimal per-dir spec-pinned migration. Binds the representative structured output (the per-vendor Scope-3 emission attribution list) to an in-dir recompute primitive and the generic structured comparator over the allowlisted climate_attribution_v1 schema (fields vendor_id/tier/attributed_kg_co2e). Distinct from the central spec_id climate.emission.v1 (different id, different primitive_id, different comparator kind). Authority-pinned, not producer-asserted.
